name: Inbox & Notifications
description: Complete inbox notification system: sidebar unread badge, notification triggers for all key actions, archive UI, issue navigation from notifications, and real-time sync across tabs.
currentState: All core tasks done. Backend: unread-count endpoint, comment notifies assignee, status change notifies creator, unassign notifies old assignee, mark read/archive broadcast WS events. Frontend: SDK types fixed, sidebar unread badge, View Issue link, archive button, real-time sync via useRealtimeSync. Remaining: loading/empty states — deferred as UI polish.
decisions: Inbox uses useInboxStore from global store (not page-local useState)
Sidebar badge reads unread count from store, updated by WS events
Backend adds GET /api/inbox/unread-count endpoint using existing CountUnreadInbox SQL query
Mark read and archive broadcast WS events (inbox:read, inbox:archived) for cross-tab sync
New notification triggers: comment on assigned issue, status change notifies creator, unassign notifies old assignee
SDK markInboxRead and archiveInbox return Promise<InboxItem> not Promise<void>
Inbox detail shows View Issue link when issue_id present, and Archive button
3 tasks auto-completed by infra migration: WS events, TS types, realtime sync

tasks.scope: CountUnreadInbox handler using existing SQL query. Returns { count: number }. Route: GET /api/inbox/unread-count.

tasks.task: Backend: Broadcast WS events for mark read and archive
tasks.scope: Auto-completed by infra migration. inbox.go publishes EventInboxRead/EventInboxArchived.

tasks.task: Backend: Add notification trigger for comment on assigned issue
tasks.scope: CreateComment: if issue has member assignee != commenter, create inbox item type 'mentioned' with comment body.

tasks.task: Backend: Status change notifies creator in addition to assignee
tasks.scope: UpdateIssue: on status change, notify creator if member and != changer. Dedup check: skip if creator is also assignee.
UpdateIssue: on assignee change, notify old assignee if member and != changer with 'Unassigned from: {title}'.

tasks.task: SDK: Fix markInboxRead and archiveInbox return types
tasks.scope: Changed from Promise<void> to Promise<InboxItem>. Added getUnreadInboxCount() method.

tasks.task: Frontend: Add WS event types for inbox:read and inbox:archived
tasks.scope: Auto-completed by infra migration. Types and payloads in events.ts.
Sidebar reads unread count from useInboxStore. Shows badge pill next to Inbox label. Capped at 99+.
Link to /issues/{issue_id} shown when item has issue_id.

tasks.task: Frontend: Archive button in inbox detail
tasks.scope: Archive button calls api.archiveInbox + store.archive. Clears selection if archived item was selected.

tasks.task: Frontend: Inbox real-time sync for read/archive
tasks.scope: Auto-completed by infra migration. useRealtimeSync handles inbox:new/read/archived.

tasks.task: Frontend: Inbox loading/empty states with shadcn
